{"tool":{"name":"auto_resolve","args":{"reply":"Thank you for contacting us. Your account has been locked due to multiple failed login attempts for security purposes. Please refer to our knowledge base article KB-405 on resetting your password. You can unlock your account by clicking \"Forgot Password\" on the login page and following the instructions to reset your password. If you need further assistance, please let us know."}}}
